arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Barça eye move for Man City's Doku
arts.sum: Could Jérémy Doku make the switch from Manchester City to Barcelona? Transfer Talk has the latest news, gossip and rumors.

arts.ttl: Kyle Walker opens up on 'uncomfortable' Pep Guardiola exit talks as defender discusses Man City departure
arts.sum: AC Milan defender Kyle Walker opens up about the difficult conversation he had with Pep Guardiola before his Manchester City exit.

arts.ttl: Man City reject James McAtee loan offer as Bayer Leverkusen turn focus to Aston Villa attacker?
arts.sum: Manchester City reportedly reject a loan proposal for James McAtee as Bayer Leverkusen switch their focus to an Aston Villa attacker.

arts.ttl: Barcelona offered chance to sign Man City star this month
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona have been afforded the opportunity to bring in a member of the attacking ranks at Manchester City this month. That’s according to Diario Sport, who point…

arts.ttl: Arsenal close in on transfer of 'next Martin Odegaard' after Erling Haaland hint
arts.sum: Arsenal are hoping to win the race for Rosenborg star Sverre Nypan, who has been compared to Martin Odegaard, with Aston Villa, Tottenham and Manchester City's sister club Girona also interested in the teenager

arts.ttl: Kyle Walker made AC Milan move ‘to try something different’
arts.sum: Manchester City full-back Walker has moved to Milan on loan for the rest of the season, with an option to make the switch permanent.

arts.ttl: Kyle Walker opens up on exit talks with Pep Guardiola after leaving Man City to join Milan on loan - and reveals it was NOT a 'comfortable conversation'
arts.sum: Walker, who has played an integral role for City under Guardiola since joining the club in 2017 from Tottenham Hotspur, admitted earlier this month that he wished to 'explore opportunities abroad'
